summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP - All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed all pages working: Dashboard, HR, Delivery, Reservations, Reviews, Smart Reports, Inventory, and Super Admin panel. All three login types tested successfully: Super Admin, Admin, and Tenant.

minor.issue: Uses query parameters instead of JSON body - inconsistent with other login endpoints but works correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Super Admin login (owner@maestroegp.com + secret key 271018) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/tenants - Returns tenants list (3 tenants)
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/stats - Returns super admin stats
Backend: GET /api/login-backgrounds - Returns login backgrounds settings
Frontend: Login page loads with animated background
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 17 quick action buttons
Frontend: Dashboard shows 3 stat cards (sales, orders, average)
Frontend: HR page loads with 7 tabs (Employees, Attendance, Advances, Deductions, Bonuses, Payroll, Biometric)
Frontend: HR page shows 5 stats cards and employee list
Frontend: Delivery page loads with 3 tabs (Drivers, Map, Pending Orders)
Frontend: Delivery page shows 2 driver cards
Frontend: Reservations page loads with mock data (3 reservations)
Frontend: Reviews page loads with mock data (5 reviews, 4.4 average rating)
Frontend: Smart Reports page loads with charts and analytics
Frontend: Inventory page loads with items and movements tabs
Frontend: Super Admin login page loads with 3 fields (email, password, secret key)
Frontend: Super Admin panel shows 4 tenants with stats
Frontend: Super Admin panel shows login backgrounds settings
Frontend: Tenant (GRaffiti burger) dashboard loads with 14 quick actions
critical_code_review_comments: All authentication flows working correctly for Super Admin, Admin, and Tenant
Multi-tenant data isolation working properly - tenants only see their own data
Dashboard drag-and-drop feature for quick actions is implemented
MOCKED DATA: Reservations, Reviews, and Smart Reports use mock/demo data
All pages have proper RTL (Right-to-Left) Arabic layout
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test accounts

mocked_features.reservations: Uses demo/mock data - not connected to real database
mocked_features.reviews: Uses demo/mock data - not connected to real database
mocked_features.smart_reports: Uses demo/mock data for charts and analytics

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 comprehensive testing completed. All features working: 1) Three login types: Super Admin (with secret key 271018), Admin, Tenant. 2) Dashboard with 17 quick actions and drag-drop reordering. 3) HR system with 7 tabs. 4) Delivery with drivers and map. 5) Reservations, Reviews, Smart Reports use MOCK DATA. 6) Super Admin panel shows 4 tenants (Main System, Hosam Food, GRaffiti burger, مطعم البيت العراقي). 7) Login backgrounds customization available in Super Admin. All APIs return 200 OK.
